comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: Stale
labels.description: The issue was not processed on time and was bumped to the top of the list

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://paloalto.local.onsite.pl/?#network::vsys1::network/interfaces](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fpaloalto.local.onsite.pl%2F%3F%23network%3A%3Avsys1%3A%3Anetwork%2Finterfaces) ### Comment > The issue affects several sections of the Palo Alto configuration interface. The embedded frames fail to load, and after a while the page times out. > > Disabling the extension immediately resolves the issue. > > The problem started approximately 2–3 weeks ago. comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.hulu.com/watch/a7976d43-3985-4dc2-9099-ec1767d6a031](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.hulu.com%2Fwatch%2Fa7976d43-3985-4dc2-9099-ec1767d6a031) ### Comment > It used to be that using Adguard on Hulu let you fast forward through commercials and the captions and pic would get out of sync, and you'd have to click "watch credits" in order to see the end of the episode because things would be, by the end of a show, 4-5 minutes out of sync. Now with Adguard running you can still ffwd through commercials, but the "out of sync" problem makes it so the episode will end early, sometimes just cutting off a few minutes sometimes cutting off over 5 minutes (whatever is after the last commercial). It's inconsistent how much time is lost but with AdGuard running there's no way to see the last few minutes of the episode, you have to turn it off, let it reload, watch a few commercials, in order to see the last few minutes of each episode. Sorry I might not have answered a lot of the questions correctly or given you screen shots that are useful -- the questions you ask in order to submit an issue are so extremely technical (overly technical, frankly, to report a problem with a service I pay for). ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/96ytwyn2d2www4oc4goc8gowssskwkk1ny2gim1acs.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/cogiltfb4xcskwgkwgg4wcg48k4os8w5t71uub8wr4.png?nc=1)

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://ahs.turkish123.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fahs.turkish123.com%2F) ### Comment > adguard açıkken video izleyemiyorum video kısmı ve video penceresi hiç yok ayrıca video penceresine gömülü olan ve içerisinde gömülü halde ki reklamlar yüzünden videoyu yine izleyemiyorum video penceresini ve video içerisindeki reklamları da engelleyecek hale getirin yada manuel kendimiz engelleyebilecek şekilde yeniden düzenleyin açılır ekranları engelleyemiyor yani kısacası adguard ya mükemmel çalışıyor tam engelliyor ama bizler yararlanamıyoruz adguardın engellerinden sonra geri kalanları yada adguard tam engelleyemiyor lütfen bunları düzeltiniz ayrıca tarayıcılar siteler sekmeler kendiliğinden yeniden başlatılıyor sürekli birileri f5 tuşuna basmış gibi sayfalar siteler sekmeler kendiliğinden yeniden başlıyor önemli bir konu araştırıyorum önemli yazılar yazıp proje hazırlamam lazım kendiliğinden yeniden başlatma yüzünden tüm emeklerim gidiyor lütfen siteler sayfalar sekmeler kendiliğinden yeniden başlatamasınlar buna da bir çözüm bulunuz ### Screenshots

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).
